parsed.explanation: Fixed mismatched closing tag </PRICE> to </PRIZE>. Added <INTRO> tags to structure the header text. Corrected extensive character encoding errors (mojibake) to restore German umlauts (ä, ö, ü, ß), currency symbols (fl.), and historical spelling (JEsu, Weihnachts, Königs). Standardized the separator between Title and Price to 'a' for consistency.
